        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Destination recommendations for Lisbon, Prague, Athens, and Budapest', 'Availability for specified travel dates (Sept 25–29, Oct 5–9, Oct 15–19, 2024)', 'Accommodation details including type (eco lodge, resort), star rating, price/night, breakfast included', 'Flight options (budget airline, roundtrip direct flight)', 'Activity options (hiking expedition, yoga retreat, walking tour, city tour, photography tour)', 'Dining options (vegan bistro, French café, Lebanese restaurant, organic farm-to-table)', 'Package total prices (€700, €850, €950, €1,750)', 'Budget compliance and remaining balance discussions (fits within €900 budget)', 'Alternative package options (eco-hybrid or luxury upgrade)', 'Information request for dietary requirements (flag yes)', 'Information request for emergency contact (flag yes)', 'Booking confirmation or tentative hold (availability_check and booking_confirmation)', 'Descriptions of amenities (rooftop garden, breakfast included, vegan dining, yoga deck)', 'Cultural and wellness activities (yoga, photography, hiking)', 'Alternative destinations and backup options (Lisbon, Budapest, Prague, Athens)']"

}

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
